business.title: The global markets are an AI story…or are they?
business.summary: The narrative that markets need an AI story is outdated. Leadership has shifted from Big Tech to broader markets and old-economy sectors, especially small caps. While AI spending remains strong, gains are concentrated in suppliers like semiconductors and infrastructure, not tech giants, signaling a deeper market rotation and changing drivers of global equity performance.
